title: Send An AGV To A Selected Square Using The Go-to Function
summary: Use the Robot Selection Go-to function to send an AGV that is not in a task to a selected square. The training source presents this as a basic operator workflow and notes it can be helpful for quick recovery or repositioning.
when_to_use: Use when an AGV is not in a task and needs to be sent to a selected square using the Robot Selection Go-to function. The source also presents this as helpful for quick recovery, including a case where a tipper goes down and an AGV will not leave.
not_for: Do not use when the AGV is in a task.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Use the Robot Selection Go-to function to select an eligible AGV, choose the destination square, and confirm the move.

safety_notes: The source states the AGV must not be in a task before using the Go-to function.
Do not invent alternate movement or recovery actions beyond the documented Go-to steps.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Robot Selection Go-to function
Ability to select an AGV and destination square

access_required: Access to the Robot Selection Go-to function
system_preconditions: The AGV is not in a task.

visual_references.description: Training slide frame showing the Robot Selection Go-to function and the documented step sequence.

steps.title: Open the Robot Selection Go-to function
steps.purpose: Access the interface used to manually send an eligible AGV to a selected square.
steps.instruction: Open the Robot Selection Go-to function in the interface before attempting to select an AGV or destination square.
steps.expected_result: The Robot Selection Go-to function is visible and ready for AGV selection.
steps.healthy_condition: The Go-to function screen or controls are available for use.
steps.failure_condition: The Robot Selection Go-to function is not available or cannot be accessed.

actions.label: Open Go-to function
actions.exact_action: Open the Robot Selection Go-to function.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Robot Selection Go-to function title and the listed workflow steps on the training slide.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the Robot Selection Go-to function cannot be opened or accessed.

source_evidence.text: Open the Robot Selection Go-to function. [Image support needed: training slide or screen showing the Robot Selection Go-to function title and controls.]

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Slide text reads Robot Selection Go-to function and explains that an AGV not in a task can be sent to any square.

steps.title: Select an AGV
steps.purpose: Choose the AGV that will be sent to the destination square.
steps.instruction: Select an AGV in the Robot Selection Go-to function. Ensure the AGV is not in a task before proceeding.
steps.expected_result: The intended AGV is selected in the interface.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGV can be selected and is eligible for Go-to use because it is not in a task.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV cannot be selected or is not eligible for the Go-to action.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The slide step that instructs the user to select an AGV.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the AGV cannot be selected.
Stop or escalate if the AGV is in a task.

source_evidence.text: This source states the AGV must not be in a task.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Steps shown are select an AGV, select Go to, select which square you want the AGV to go to, and select Confirm.

steps.title: Select Go to
steps.purpose: Initiate the manual move workflow for the selected AGV.
steps.instruction: After selecting the AGV, select Go to.
steps.expected_result: The interface advances to destination selection for the selected AGV.
steps.healthy_condition: The Go to option is accepted for the selected AGV.
steps.failure_condition: The Go to option cannot be selected or does not proceed to destination selection.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The slide step that instructs the user to select Go to.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the Go to option cannot be selected.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Steps shown are select an AGV, select Go to, select which square you want the AGV to go to, and select Confirm.

steps.title: Select the destination square
steps.purpose: Choose where the selected AGV should be sent.
steps.instruction: Select which square you want the AGV to go to.
steps.expected_result: A destination square is selected for the AGV.
steps.healthy_condition: The intended square is selected as the AGV destination.
steps.failure_condition: The destination square cannot be selected or the intended destination is unclear.

actions.label: Choose square
actions.exact_action: Select which square you want the AGV to go to.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The slide step that instructs the user to select which square the AGV should go to.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the destination square cannot be selected.

source_evidence.text: Select which square you want the AGV to go to.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Steps shown are select an AGV, select Go to, select which square you want the AGV to go to, and select Confirm.

steps.title: Confirm the move
steps.purpose: Submit the Go-to request so the AGV is sent to the selected square.
steps.expected_result: The selected AGV is sent to the chosen square.
steps.healthy_condition: The move is accepted and the AGV is sent to the selected square.
steps.failure_condition: The move cannot be confirmed or the AGV is not sent using the documented Go-to steps.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The slide step that instructs the user to select Confirm.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the AGV cannot be sent using the documented Go-to steps.

source_evidence.text: The selected AGV is sent to the chosen square.
Escalate if the AGV cannot be selected or cannot be sent using the documented Go-to steps.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Steps shown are select an AGV, select Go to, select which square you want the AGV to go to, and select Confirm.

success_criteria: The selected AGV is sent to the chosen square.
The Go-to workflow is completed by selecting an AGV, selecting Go to, selecting a square, and selecting Confirm.
healthy_conditions: The Robot Selection Go-to function is accessible.
The AGV is not in a task.
A destination square can be selected.
The move can be confirmed and the AGV is sent to the selected square.
failure_conditions: The Robot Selection Go-to function cannot be accessed.
The AGV is in a task.
The destination square cannot be selected.
The AGV cannot be sent using the documented Go-to steps.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the AGV cannot be selected.
Escalate if the AGV cannot be sent using the documented Go-to steps.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Training slide showing the Robot Selection Go-to function and the step sequence for sending an AGV to a selected square.

missing_details: The source does not provide a time estimate.
The source does not specify production stop requirements.
The source does not specify LOTO requirements.
The source does not document exact UI navigation beyond the Go-to workflow steps.
The source does not provide explicit confirmation text or status indicators after the move is submitted.
